list.errorSubtitle: The current assessment catalog or your previous submissions could not be loaded.
list.heroSubtitle: Validated screening tools to monitor your mental health and provide clearer inputs to your care team.
list.emptySubtitle: There are no published assessments available for your account right now.
list.descriptionFallback: No assessment description is available yet.

detail.errorSubtitle: Assessment definition details are unavailable right now.
detail.fallbackIntro: This assessment helps your care team understand your recent symptoms using a structured questionnaire.
detail.privacyBody: All of your answers are encrypted and protected. They are only shared with your assigned clinician.
detail.supportBody: There are no right or wrong answers. Answer honestly so you receive the most suitable care.

question.errorSubtitle: The question flow is unavailable right now.
question.unsupportedSubtitle: This mobile flow currently supports only single-choice questions from the published backend contract.
question.subtitleFallback: Choose the answer that best reflects how you have been feeling recently.
question.requiredError: Please choose one answer before continuing.

result.errorSubtitle: Your saved submission result is unavailable right now.
result.unavailableSubtitle: This submission does not currently expose a completed result payload.
result.title: Your assessment result
result.subtitle: Thank you for completing the assessment. We prepared this summary to help you understand your current state and the next appropriate steps.
result.notice: This assessment is a guidance tool and not a medical diagnosis. If these feelings are difficult to manage, support is available.
result.actionTherapistBody: Book a consultation with one of our specialists to discuss your symptoms and receive tailored support.
result.actionExerciseBody: Explore breathing and grounding exercises designed to reduce day-to-day anxiety.
result.actionLibraryBody: Read trusted articles about managing anxiety and improving daily wellbeing.
result.saveTitle: Do you want to keep this result?
result.saveBody: You can return to this result later and share it with your care team from your profile history.

wallet.title: Wallet balance
wallet.subtitle: Wallet details are currently available in payment-related flows only

support.subtitle: Support center is not available in this mobile build yet

details.title: Personal details
details.subtitle: Update your profile details
details.saveFailedBody: Could not update your profile details right now.
details.invalidCountryBody: Country code must be 2 or 3 letters.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose app language
language.saveFailedBody: Could not update language settings right now.
language.restartBody: Language changed successfully. Restart the app to apply layout direction changes everywhere.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Session reminders and account alerts
notifications.unavailableSubtitle: Notification preferences are not available for this account yet
notifications.saveFailedBody: Could not update notification preferences right now.

common.syncWarning: Some profile settings could not be synced. You can still use logout.

placeholders.otpEmail: Optional if OTP should go elsewhere

validation.passwordHint: Use the same credential rules enforced by the backend.

entry.title: Breathe deeply.
entry.subtitle: We're here.
entry.patientBody: Email/password sign in with optional Google sign in when native client IDs are configured.
entry.practitionerBody: Email/password starts the session, then OTP verification completes the sign in.

patientSignIn.title: Continue your care journey
patientSignIn.subtitle: This screen uses the real patient auth contract from the backend and mirrors the patient path used on web.
patientSignIn.googleHelper: Google sign in sends the native ID token to the backend patient Google endpoint.
patientSignIn.googleUnavailable: Google sign in needs platform client IDs in the mobile environment before it can run.
patientSignIn.noForgotPasswordYet: Patient forgot-password is not exposed by the current backend contract.

practitionerSignIn.title: Access your practitioner workspace
practitionerSignIn.subtitle: Credentials create the OTP challenge. OTP verification issues the real session tokens.
practitionerSignIn.otpHint: We sent a code through {{channel}} to {{target}}.

patientSignUp.title: Create your patient account
patientSignUp.subtitle: Patient registration returns a real authenticated session, so you can enter the app immediately after success.

patientForgotPassword.title: Recover patient access
patientForgotPassword.subtitle: Password reset for patient accounts is not published in the backend contract yet.
patientForgotPassword.contractBlocked: This screen is intentionally read-only until backend exposes a patient forgot/reset password contract.

practitionerSignUp.title: Start your practitioner onboarding
practitionerSignUp.subtitle: This mobile screen sends the real practitioner registration payload, including specialty category and specialty selection.
practitionerSignUp.otpEmailHelper: Optional. If empty, OTP falls back to the main verified channel.
practitionerSignUp.selectCategoryFirst: Choose a category to load matching specialties.

practitionerForgotPassword.title: Recover practitioner access
practitionerForgotPassword.subtitle: Request the reset code first, then use the same verified email and code to set a new password.

intro.title: Find the right therapist for you
intro.subtitle: Answer a few focused questions and we will recommend professionals that fit your needs.

urgency.title: How soon do you need support?

concern.title: Primary concern
concern.placeholder: Share a short summary so we can improve your recommendations...

results.title: Here are your best-fit therapists
results.subtitle: Ranked based on your preferences and matching score.
results.emptySubtitle: Try changing your preferences and submit again.

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by therapist name or specialty

profile.availabilityNotice: Live availability is not exposed by this profile endpoint yet.

common.loadError: Could not load data right now.

selectTime.title: Choose session time
selectTime.noSlots: No available slots in this week. Try another week.
selectTime.timezoneHint: All times are shown in {{timezone}} timezone.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmation
confirmation.heading: Review session details
confirmation.subtitle: Please verify the information below before proceeding.
confirmation.honestPaymentNotice: Payment is 100% secure. Charges are only applied after the practitioner confirms the appointment.
confirmation.policyHint: You can cancel or reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before the session.

success.title: Booking completed
success.subtitle: Your booking has been recorded successfully.
success.pendingSubtitle: Complete payment to activate and confirm this session.
success.confirmedSubtitle: Your appointment is confirmed and a reminder will be sent before the session.
success.pendingPaymentHint: Your booking is created. Please complete payment to activate the session.
success.confirmedHint: Your booking is confirmed and the session is active.

list.subtitle: Track your upcoming and past sessions in one place.
list.emptyDescription: Once you complete your first booking, sessions will appear here.

detail.title: Session details
detail.preparationHint: Make sure your internet connection, microphone, and camera are ready before joining.

joinBlockedReasons.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: This session status is not joinable yet.
joinBlockedReasons.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: Only video sessions can be joined here.
joinBlockedReasons.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: Joining window is not open yet.
joinBlockedReasons.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: Session room is still being prepared.

cancelPreview.title: Cancel session
cancelPreview.heading: Review cancellation
cancelPreview.subtitle: Please review the details below before confirming your cancellation.
cancelPreview.cannotCancelNow: This session cannot be cancelled right now.

blockingReasons.SESSION_CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED_BY_POLI: Cancellation is not permitted under the booking policy that applies to this session.
blockingReasons.SESSION_ALREADY_CANCELLED: This session has already been cancelled.
blockingReasons.SESSION_COMPLETED: A completed session cannot be cancelled.
blockingReasons.SESSION_IN_PROGRESS: A session that is in progress cannot be cancelled.
blockingReasons.UNKNOWN: Cancellation is not available at this time.

matchedRuleCodes.INSTANT_NO_CANCEL: Cancellation not permitted for instant bookings

wallet.title: Wallet & Payments
wallet.subtitle: Manage your clinical funds and transaction history securely
wallet.addFundsUnavailable: Manual top-up is not available from the app yet
wallet.paymentMethodsUnavailable: Payment method management is not available yet
wallet.refundHint: Refunds are automatically added to your wallet after processing.
wallet.secureHint: Your payments are encrypted and secure
wallet.errorNote: Please check your connection and try again.
wallet.noWallet: No wallet has been linked to this account yet

payments.emptyNote: Your session payments will appear here after your first confirmed session.

statusNotes.FAILED: Payment failed. You can try again.
statusNotes.PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Part of the amount has been refunded.
statusNotes.REFUNDED: The full amount has been refunded.

transactions.title: Wallet History
transactions.walletScopeNote: This balance is your in-app wallet only.
transactions.walletOnlyNote: Payments via card / Mada gateway are not shown here — check the Payments screen for a full transaction history.

checkout.title: Payment Summary
checkout.sessionExpired: The payment window for this session has expired
checkout.sessionNotPayable: This session is not payable at this time

state.walletOnly: The payment will be fully covered by your wallet balance.

checkout.gatewayNotice: Payment page will open in your browser to complete securely.
checkout.stripeNotice: Direct card payment will be enabled after the Stripe mobile SDK is installed.
checkout.pricingUnavailableNote: No pricing is configured for this session yet. Please contact support or try again later.

empty.title: No tickets
empty.activeSubtitle: You have no active support requests at the moment.
empty.resolvedSubtitle: No resolved or closed tickets yet.

new.title: New Support Request
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your issue in detail so our support team can help you better
new.subjectRequired: Please enter a subject with at least 4 characters.
new.descriptionRequired: Please enter a description with at least 10 characters.

detail.title: Ticket Details
detail.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation with our support team.
detail.closedNotice: This ticket is closed and no longer accepts replies.

inactiveNotice.REVOKED: Access to this conversation has been revoked.
inactiveNotice.default: This conversation is no longer active.

careChat.newRequest: Request a chat with a practitioner

empty.title: No requests

new.title: Request Professional Chat
new.approvalNote: Your request will be reviewed by our team. You will be notified once a decision is made.
new.practitionerSlugHint: You can find the identifier on the practitioner's profile page.

requestDetail.title: Request Details
requestDetail.pendingNotice: Your request is under review. You will be notified once a decision is made.
requestDetail.rejectedNotice: Unfortunately, your chat request was rejected. You can open a support ticket if you need assistance.

conversation.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation with your practitioner.

journey.completePaymentSubtitle: You have a pending payment for a session.

common.loadError: Could not load the practitioner workspace right now.

home.title: Practitioner workspace
home.noSessions: There are no upcoming sessions in active states right now.

approvalNotice.title: Full workspace access is not available yet
approvalNotice.body: This account has not reached the fully approved web state yet. Mobile shows the real account state here without inventing onboarding routes that are not implemented yet.

sessions.title: Practitioner sessions
sessions.noSchedule: No schedule has been assigned yet
sessions.emptyBody: There are no sessions matching the current filter.

sessionDetail.title: Session details
sessionDetail.runtimeBody: This screen uses the real practitioner prepare and join contracts from the backend. A room link only opens if the contract explicitly allows it.
sessionDetail.preparePending: Prepare request was sent, but the runtime is not ready yet.
sessionDetail.openRoomReady: The session room is ready to open.
sessionDetail.prepareError: The room cannot be prepared right now. Try again closer to the session time.
sessionDetail.joinError: Join availability could not be checked right now. Try again in a moment.
sessionDetail.openRoomError: The session room could not be opened from this device right now.
sessionDetail.closeoutError: The session status could not be updated right now. Try again.
sessionDetail.noImmediateAction: There is no immediate action required for this session right now.

blocked.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: The current session status does not allow joining.
blocked.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: This session is not in video mode.
blocked.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: The join window is not open yet.
blocked.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: The session runtime is not prepared yet.

sessionDetail.completedFeedback: The session was marked as completed.
sessionDetail.noShowFeedback: The session was marked as no show.

stateNote.PENDING_PAYMENT: This session is still waiting for payment, so there is no direct action for you right now.
stateNote.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: This session is waiting for your confirmation or for the system to move it to the next state.
stateNote.UPCOMING: The appointment is coming up, but the join window is not open yet. Review the time and get ready before it starts.
stateNote.UPCOMING_NEEDS_PREPARE: The appointment is coming up, and the clearest next step is to prepare the session room before checking access.
stateNote.READY_TO_JOIN_NOW: This session is ready now, and you can open the room directly.
stateNote.READY_TO_JOIN_PREPARE: The session is near its time, but the room still needs preparation before you try to join.
stateNote.READY_TO_JOIN_CHECK: This session is near its time. Check join access now to confirm whether the room can be opened.
stateNote.IN_PROGRESS: The session is live now. Check join access if you need to continue the session immediately.
stateNote.IN_PROGRESS_OPEN: The session is live now and the room can be opened directly.
stateNote.COMPLETED: This session has already finished. There is no direct action now besides reviewing the details.
stateNote.NO_SHOW: This session has already been recorded as a no-show, so there is no further direct action now.
stateNote.CANCELLED: This session was cancelled, so the room cannot be opened and there are no live actions left.
stateNote.EXPIRED: This session expired before completion, so there are no direct actions now.
stateNote.REFUND_PENDING: This session is in a pending refund state, so there are no direct actions now.
stateNote.REFUNDED: The refund for this session has already been processed, so there are no direct actions now.
stateNote.DEFAULT: This session does not expose a direct action from this screen right now.

nextStep.waitForPayment: Wait for payment to finish before any operational step.
nextStep.waitForConfirmation: Check back when the session moves into a confirmed appointment state.
nextStep.waitForWindow: Come back near the appointment time to see whether the join window has opened.
nextStep.prepareRoom: Prepare the room first, then check whether joining is available.
nextStep.checkJoin: Check join access now to see whether the session can be opened.
nextStep.openRoom: Open the room and continue with the patient.
nextStep.reviewOnly: Review the details only. There is no further operational step right now.

actionSummary.openRoom: You can open the session room now without any extra step.
actionSummary.prepareRoom: The clearest next action right now is to prepare the session room.
actionSummary.checkJoin: Check join access to confirm whether the room can be opened right now.
actionSummary.closeout: You can update the session outcome if it has ended or if the patient did not attend.
actionSummary.none: This screen reflects the current backend truth, but there is no operational action required right now.

closeoutSummary.COMPLETED: This session is already completed and does not need another closeout update.
closeoutSummary.NO_SHOW: This session is already marked as no-show and does not need another update.
closeoutSummary.CLOSED: This session is already effectively closed, so there is no further closeout action.
closeoutSummary.NOT_READY: Closeout actions only appear when the session reaches a state that allows them.

availability.title: Availability and presence
availability.presenceBody: This status is separate from the weekly schedule and mirrors the real backend presence surface.
availability.instantBookingBody: Turns instant-booking readiness on or off without changing the weekly schedule.
availability.instantBookingEnabled: Instant booking is currently on for cases the system allows.
availability.instantBookingDisabled: Instant booking is currently off, so new instant requests will not reach you.
availability.scheduleBody: Manage your weekly working hours here in a simple way. Changes are not saved until you tap save schedule.
availability.emptySchedule: There are no active weekly slots right now.
availability.saveHint: You can arrange all weekly slots first, then save the schedule in one step.
availability.saveSuccess: The weekly schedule was saved successfully.
availability.saveError: The weekly schedule could not be saved right now.
availability.exceptionsBody: Add temporary overrides when you need to block a specific window or open extra time outside the weekly schedule.
availability.emptyExceptions: There are no active exceptions right now.
availability.exceptionReasonPlaceholder: Example: personal leave or extra opening
availability.exceptionSaveError: The exception could not be saved right now.
availability.exceptionDeleteError: The exception could not be removed right now.

validation.invalidTime: Enter time in a valid format like 09:00.
validation.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
validation.overlap: This slot overlaps with another slot on the same day.
validation.exceptionDatesRequired: Enter both the exception start and end time.
validation.invalidDateTime: Enter date/time in a valid format like 2026-04-25T14:00.
